windows.summary: Microsoft released 25 CVEs for 2026-Jul. 5 Critical, 4 Important.

cves.title: net: rds: clear i_sends on setup unwind
drm/virtio: Fix driver removal with disabled KMS
ARM: 9475/1: entry: use byte load for KASAN VMAP stack shadow
drm/amd/display: Use krealloc_array() in dal_vector_reserve()
signal: clear JOBCTL_PENDING_MASK for caller in zap_other_threads()
netfilter: nf_conntrack: destroy stale expectfn expectations on unregister
Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling in Elasticsearch Leading to Denial of Service
Dhcpcd: dhcpcd infinite loop and out-of-bounds read via zero-length ipv6 nd option in router advertisement handling
arm64: errata: Mitigate TLBI errata on various Arm CPUs
runc: Malicious image with /dev symlink can trigger limited host filesystem integrity violations
KVM: Don't WARN if memory is dirtied without a vCPU when the VM is dying
slimbus: qcom-ngd-ctrl: Register callbacks after creating the ngd
nvmem: layouts: onie-tlv: fix hang on unknown types
debugobjects: Do not fill_pool() if pi_blocked_on
net: bonding: fix NULL pointer dereference in bond_do_ioctl()
drm/i915/gem: Fix phys BO pread/pwrite with offset
hsr: Remove WARN_ONCE() in hsr_addr_is_self().
i2c: qcom-cci: Fix NULL pointer dereference in cci_remove()
Uncontrolled Resource Consumption in Elasticsearch Leading to Denial of Service
Bluetooth: fix UAF in l2cap_sock_cleanup_listen() vs l2cap_conn_del()
Microsoft Entra Provisioning Service Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
Azure OpenAI Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
Microsoft Azure Synapse Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
Microsoft 365 Copilot Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
Microsoft Exchange Online Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability

apple.summary: No Apple security releases found for July 2026.

ubuntu.summary: Ubuntu published 10 security notices in July 2026 covering 1755 CVEs.

notices.title: USN-8500-1: Vim vulnerabilities
notices.summary:
It was discovered that Vim incorrectly handled path traversal in the
zip.vim plugin. An attacker could possibly use this issue to overwrite
arbitrary files. This issue only affected Ubuntu 14.04 LTS, Ubuntu 16.04
LTS, Ubuntu 18.04 LTS, Ubuntu 20.04 LTS, and Ubuntu 22.04 LTS.
(CVE-2026-35177)

It was

notices.title: USN-8501-1: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
notices.summary:
It was discovered that a logic flaw existed in the XFRM ESP-in-TCP
subsystem in the Linux kernel when handling socket buffer fragments. This
flaw is known as Fragnesia. A local attacker could use this to escalate
privileges, or possibly escape a container. (CVE-2026-43503)

Several security issues w

notices.title: USN-8493-2: Linux kernel (Oracle) vulnerabilities
USN-8499-1: Linux kernel (Xilinx) vulnerabilities
notices.summary:
It was discovered that the Linux kernel algif_aead module did not properly
handle in-place cryptographic operations. This flaw is known as Copy Fail.
A local attacker could use this to escalate privileges, or possibly escape
a container. (CVE-2026-31431)

notices.title: USN-8498-1: Linux kernel (NVIDIA Tegra) vulnerabilities
USN-8497-1: Linux kernel (Low Latency) vulnerabilities
notices.summary:
It was discovered that the Linux kernel did not properly handle shared page
fragments during socket buffer operations, collectively known as Dirty
Frag. A logic flaw existed in the XFRM ESP-in-TCP subsystem and in the
RxRPC networking subsystem when processing paged fragments. A local
attacker could

notices.title: USN-8492-2: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
USN-8496-1: cifs-utils vulnerability
notices.summary:
It was discovered that cifs-utils incorrectly dropped root privileges
before looking up user information. A local attacker could possibly use
this issue to execute arbitrary code as the root user.

notices.title: USN-8488-2: Linux kernel (Raspberry Pi) vulnerabilities
notices.summary:
It was discovered that some AMD processors did not properly clear data in
the floating point divider unit during speculative execution. A local
attacker could use this to expose sensitive information. (CVE-2025-54505)

Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel.
An attacker could po

notices.title: USN-8495-1: nghttp2 vulnerability
notices.summary:
It was discovered that the nghttp2 nghttpx proxy incorrectly handled
HTTP/1.1 Upgrade requests that included a Content-Length header and body.
A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to perform HTTP request and
response smuggling attacks against backend services.
